mapper.insert: INSERT INTO flow_cc (flow_apply_id, user_id, read_status, read_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{flowApplyId}, #{userId}, #{readStatus}, #{readAt}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO flow_cc (flow_apply_id, user_id, read_status, read_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.flowApplyId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.readStatus}, #{item.readAt}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, flow_apply_id AS flowApplyId, user_id AS userId, read_status AS readStatus, read_at AS readAt, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM flow_cc WHERE flow_apply_id = #{flowApplyId}
